name: claude-skills
description: Vadim Shchepin's Claude Code skills marketplace. Each skill installs individually.

metadata.description: Individually installable Claude Code skills for SEO, AI visibility, and adjacent work.

plugins.name: google-geo
plugins.description: Optimize for Google's generative AI features (AI Overviews, AI Mode) using Google's own Search Central guidance, including the mythbusting that llms.txt, content chunking, and special schema are not needed for Google.

plugins.name: bing-geo-optimization
plugins.description: Optimize content to get cited by Microsoft Copilot and Bing's generative AI. Grounded in a real Bing Webmaster Tools AI citation export: the defined-jargon + named-tools + benchmark-numbers recipe that wins grounding queries, how to read Bing's AI reports, the grounding-query reverse-engineering method, and IndexNow eligibility.
